advancements.apotheosis.progression.have: Haven is unlocked by the early Medieval onboarding quest in Ascension of Ages. Affix gear pickup no longer auto-unlocks tiers.
advancements.apotheosis.progression.fron: Frontier is granted by the Renaissance capstone quest in Ascension of Ages. Equipping affix gear no longer auto-unlocks this tier.
advancements.apotheosis.progression.asce: Ascent is granted by the Industrial Revolution capstone quest in Ascension of Ages. Killing an Apothic Invader no longer auto-unlocks this tier.
advancements.apotheosis.progression.summ: Summit is granted by the Gilded capstone quest in Ascension of Ages. Slaying the Wither is an optional thematic side-objective and does not unlock this tier.
advancements.apotheosis.progression.pinn: Pinnacle is granted by the Atomic capstone quest in Ascension of Ages. Slaying the Ender Dragon is an optional thematic side-objective and does not unlock this tier.
